system.flavor: You crack the earth with your step, sending out rippling shockwaves.
system.effect:
Area Effect [X]: Smash every character in burst 1 (self) or (4+) burst 2 (self).
Area effect difficult terrain under every character in range, then those characters are dazed.
Sacrifice 3 or gain Reckless +1, and deals 2 damage, once, to all characters in the area. You may repeat this effect up to 3 times.
